en.tradeBot.strategy.section.config.descrip: Strategy-specific parameters rendered by the existing config-driven form engine.

en.tradeBot.strategy.section.guide.title: Form Guide

en.tradeBot.strategy.typePicker.title: Choose Strategy Type

en.tradeBot.strategy.toast.reviewBeforeSave: Please review the highlighted sections before saving.
en.tradeBot.strategy.meta.firstM15.descript: Breakout and retest strategy around the first New York M15 candle.
en.tradeBot.strategy.meta.emaPullback.descr: Higher timeframe EMA trend filter with lower timeframe pullback reclaim.
en.tradeBot.strategy.meta.openingRange.desc: Breakout from the opening range with next-candle execution.
en.tradeBot.strategy.meta.prevDay.descripti: Retest continuation after prior-day high or low break.
en.tradeBot.strategy.meta.donchian.descript: 20-bar Donchian breakout with ATR-based stop placement.
en.tradeBot.strategy.meta.bollingerRsi.desc: Bollinger band reclaim paired with RSI extreme reversal.
en.tradeBot.strategy.meta.bollingerRsiSr.de: Bollinger and RSI mean reversion that only triggers when price reclaims a support or resistance zone.
en.tradeBot.strategy.meta.vwapPullback.desc: Intraday VWAP pullback and reclaim entry model.
en.tradeBot.strategy.meta.asiaLondon.descri: Asia range breakout traded from London session expansion.
en.tradeBot.strategy.meta.insideBar.descrip: Multi-timeframe inside bar breakout with confirmation entry.
en.tradeBot.strategy.meta.rsiDivergence.des: Pivot-based RSI divergence swing reversal strategy.
en.tradeBot.strategy.meta.liquidityFvg.desc: Liquidity sweep followed by fair value gap reclaim entry.
en.tradeBot.replay.title: Backtest Replay
en.tradeBot.replay.execution.title: Backtest Execution
en.tradeBot.replay.execution.description: Backend runs the job. Frontend loads the replay timeline and keeps playback state locally.
en.tradeBot.replay.execution.slFirstRule: If the same candle hits both SL and TP without tick data, SL is prioritized first.
en.tradeBot.replay.chart.title: Replay Chart
en.tradeBot.replay.chart.description: Candle-by-candle playback with strategy overlays mapped onto the base chart.

en.tradeBot.replay.orders.description: Sortable table for replay trades and post-run review.

en.tradeBot.replay.step.description: Rule pass or fail state for the current candle step.
en.tradeBot.replay.step.noEvent: No event fired on this candle.
en.tradeBot.replay.step.empty: Replay step data will appear after a backtest job is selected.

en.tradeBot.replay.eventLog.description: Filter by event type and click any item to jump the replay.

en.tradeBot.replay.tradeTimeline.descriptio: Click a trade to sync the chart, replay step and explanation panel.
en.tradeBot.replay.autoPause.title: Auto Pause
en.tradeBot.replay.autoPause.description: Pause replay automatically on selected event types.

en.tradeBot.backtest.run.description: Launch a backtest by choosing a binding, time range, balances, fees, and risk settings.
en.tradeBot.backtest.run.infoDescription: Review the binding and market setup carefully. The selected values drive historical inputs and risk simulation behavior.
en.tradeBot.strategyConfig.form.description: Create or maintain reusable strategy definitions and their top-level metadata.

en.tradeBot.strategy.form.selectedRuleDescr: Strategies now reuse rule presets instead of re-entering config on every binding.
en.tradeBot.strategy.form.ruleSlotsDescript: Select the rule for each slot. Strategy will use the selected rule configuration.
en.tradeBot.strategy.form.noRuleSlots: This strategy has no rule slots in STRATEGY_DEFINITIONS.
en.tradeBot.strategy.form.noRuleSelected: No rule selected for this slot.
en.tradeBot.strategy.form.ruleNoDescription: This rule has no description yet.
en.tradeBot.strategy.form.rulePreviewEmpty: Choose a rule to preview its reusable configuration here.

en.tradeBot.strategyRule.form.description: Rule fields are generated from the selected rule code. Strategies reuse these parameters when evaluating the rule.

en.tradeBot.strategyRule.validation.min.2: Value must be greater than or equal to 2

en.tradeBot.strategyRule.test.description: Preview the selected rule against chart data to verify overlays and signal logic.
en.tradeBot.backtest.detail.title: Backtest Detail
en.tradeBot.strategyRule.definition.rsi.des: Configure RSI calculation inputs used by the selected strategy.
en.tradeBot.strategyRule.definition.macd.de: Configure MACD periods for strategies that calculate MACD signals.
en.tradeBot.strategyRule.definition.ema.des: Configure the EMA period used by the selected strategy.
en.tradeBot.strategyRule.definition.sma.des: Configure the SMA period used by the selected strategy.
en.tradeBot.strategyRule.definition.downTre: Configure the lookback used to detect down-trend conditions.
en.tradeBot.strategyRule.definition.upTrend: Configure the lookback used to detect up-trend conditions.
en.tradeBot.strategyRule.definition.pivotPo: Configure pivot detection windows used by the selected strategy.
en.tradeBot.strategyRule.definition.noExtra: This rule does not require extra parameters.
en.tradeBot.strategyRule.definition.fallbac: No generated schema is available for this rule code yet.
